name: Chemical Reactions and Equations
summary: Introduction to chemical formulas, writing equations, and balancing chemical reactions. Types of reactions: combination, decomposition, displacement, and redox.

name: Acids, Bases, and Salts
summary: Chemical properties of acids and bases, pH scale, role of pH in daily life, and preparation of common salts like Bleaching Powder, Baking Soda, and Washing Soda.

name: Metals and Non-Metals
summary: Physical and chemical properties of metals and non-metals, reactivity series, formation of ionic compounds, metallurgy principles, and corrosion prevention.

name: Carbon and its Compounds
summary: Covalent bonding in carbon compounds, versatile nature of carbon, homologous series, nomenclature, chemical properties of carbon compounds, and soaps/detergents.

name: Life Processes
summary: Basic concepts of nutrition, respiration, transport, and excretion in plants and animals.
